name: Rehearsal Dinners
headline: Start the Celebration Right
description: A relaxed, elevated setting for the night before the big day. Semi-private spaces, family-style menus, and a rooftop sunset that sets the tone.

faqs.q: How many guests can a rehearsal dinner hold?
faqs.a: Up to 80 guests, in a semi-private space.

faqs.q: Is the menu customizable for a rehearsal dinner?
faqs.a: Yes — family-style menus are built around your group.

faqs.q: Can we get rooftop sunset views for a rehearsal dinner?
faqs.a: Yes — the rooftop's sunset views are one of the most popular settings for rehearsal dinners.

imageAlt: Rehearsal Dinners venue space at Park 101 Carlsbad
